name: Jane Wanjiku Kamau
summary: Results-driven Data Analyst with 5+ years translating complex datasets into strategic decisions across public health, finance, and agriculture sectors in East Africa.

experience.title: Senior Data Analyst
bullets: Built automated ETL pipelines in Python reducing reporting time from 3 days to 4 hours
Developed a taxpayer compliance prediction model (XGBoost) with 89% accuracy, flagging KSh 2.1B in under-reported income
Led a team of 4 analysts delivering monthly dashboards to 12 executive stakeholders
Migrated legacy Access databases to PostgreSQL, improving query performance by 300%

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Analysed beneficiary data across 8 counties to optimise food distribution for 45,000+ households
Built Power BI dashboards used in quarterly donor reporting (USAID, ECHO)
Cleaned and geocoded 120,000-row household survey dataset for drought response programme

certifications: Microsoft PL-300 Power BI Data Analyst (2023)
notable_achievements: KRA Director General Award for Innovation (2023)
Published in African Journal of Statistics: 'Mobile Money Data as a Proxy for Household Income' (2022)

referees.name: Dr. Alice Mwangi
referees.title: Head of Research, Kenya Revenue Authority
